rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no interaction with Educ. Code §48.155, which governs reimbursement of school district fees for career-readiness assessment instruments. No statutory conflict exists.
quote: A school district is entitled to reimbursement for the amount of fees paid by the district for the administration of an assessment instrument under Section 39.0261(a)(3).
_note: No conflict between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and this Education Code provision.
